Title: Zine Site?
Description:
A website in this style where people can post zines.
I had images of zines in mind a lot while making this site.
I think it would fit quite well.

Title: Have a great Idea?
Description:
If YOU have a great idea you think I should make, feel free to send me an email!

As mentioned I do my best work in C#/.Net, so it should be compatible with that.
